summary: 股价跌至$95（较高点跌80%），管理层明确2026优先增长而非利润，8门新学科上线（地理/历史/物理/化学等），4/30财报成下一催化剂

entries.content: 股价跌至$95，较6个月前高点下跌68.7%，分析师下调EPS预期至$3.08（-64.1% YoY）
entries.detail: DUOL stock down 80% from peak above $500 to ~$95. Short interest 16.26%. Morgan Stanley cut PT from $245 to $100. Average analyst target $176.88 (Buy consensus). Board approved $400M share repurchase.

entries.content: 3/31上线8门新学科：地理、历史、物理、化学、植物学、动物学、人体生物学、天文学（限量用户）
entries.detail: Duolingo geography, history, physics, chemistry, botany, zoology, human biology, and astronomy released to select users on 3/31/2026. This represents a massive expansion from language-only to a true general education platform.

entries.content: 2026战略明确：优先增长而非利润，bookings增长仅10-12%，revenue增长15-18%，调整后EBITDA margin约25%
entries.detail: Management admitted prior strategies leaned too heavily on friction-based monetization. 2026 guided to bookings growth 10-12% (vs 40%+ prior), revenue growth 15-18%, EBITDA margin ~25%. Targeting 100M DAU by 2028. Q2 EBITDA margin to drop ~3pp sequentially as AI costs rise.

entries.content: AI课程替换：西班牙语和法语课程已被AI生成版本替换（2月底），4月预计上线中文/日文B2级别
entries.detail: Spanish and French courses from English were replaced by new AI-generated versions in late February 2026. Projected April releases: Chinese and Japanese B2 (first half), Italian/Portuguese/Korean B2 (second half).

entries.content: CEO Luis von Ahn 出租车司机面试法曝光：候选人对司机态度决定是否录用
entries.detail: Fortune revealed Duolingo pays taxi/Uber drivers to evaluate candidates. One CFO candidate rejected because 'they were pretty mean to their driver.' Von Ahn: if mean to driver, they'll be mean to people under them.

entries.content: DUOL股价单日暴涨7%+（周二），4/30财报为下一催化剂
entries.detail: Duolingo stock surged 7%+ on Tuesday. Next major catalyst: April 30 estimated earnings report. Analysts debating whether AI-driven platforms can sustain growth as competition expands.

entries.content: Explain My Answer功能从付费Max转为全用户免费（2026年1月1日起）
entries.detail: Starting January 1, 2026, the Explain My Answer feature — previously part of Duolingo Max subscription — was made free for all learners. This is part of the strategy to make the free version 'the best it's ever been.'
